highLevelDescription: This project follows a modern SPA architecture built with React, featuring a clear separation between UI components, business logic, and data layer. The application is fully client-side, with all content loaded statically from JSON and Markdown files.

diagrams.name: High-Level Architecture
diagrams.description: Overview of the system architecture and component relationships
diagrams.mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
    A[User Browser] --> B[React Application]
    B --> C[UI Components]
    B --> D[Business Logic]
    B --> E[Data Layer]
    E --> F[Static Content Files]
    F --> G[JSON Data]
    F --> H[Markdown Content]
    C --> I[Layout Components]
    C --> J[Page Components]
    C --> K[Reusable Components]
    D --> L[Content Loading Logic]
    D --> M[Utility Functions]

layers.name: Presentation Layer
layers.responsibility: Rendering UI components and handling user interactions

layers.name: Business Logic Layer
layers.responsibility: Handling application logic and data transformation

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.responsibility: Loading and providing access to documentation content
